titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ قَدْ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ وَ أُثْبِتَ فِي صُدُورِهِمْ
titles.en: Chapter 23 – The Imamsasws have been Given the Knowledge and Affirmed into theirasws chests

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ قَدْ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ وَ أُثْبِتَ فِي صُدُورِهِمْ
titles.en: Chapter 23 – The Imamsasws have been Given the Knowledge and Affirmed into theirasws chests

segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ فِي هَذِهِ الْآيَةِ بَلْ هُوَ آياتٌ بَيِّناتٌ فِي صُدُورِ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ فَأَوْمَأَ بِيَدِهِ إِلَى صَدْرِهِ .
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ فِي هَذِهِ الْآيَةِ بَلْ هُوَ آياتٌ بَيِّناتٌ فِي صُدُورِ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ فَأَوْمَأَ بِيَدِهِ إِلَى صَدْرِهِ .

segments: Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Hammad Bin Is, from Al Husayn Bin Al Mukhtar, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’farasws saying (indicating) regarding this Verse [29:49] But these are clear Verses in the chests of those who are granted Knowledge, and heasws gestured by hisasws hand towards hisasws own chest’.
en.hubeali.text: Ahmad Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Hammad Bin Is, from Al Husayn Bin Al Mukhtar, from Abu Baseer who said, ‘I heard Abu Ja’farasws saying (indicating) regarding this Verse [29:49] But these are clear Verses in the chests of those who are granted Knowledge, and heasws gestured by hisasws hand towards hisasws own chest’.

segments: 1. Ahmad ibn Mahran has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali from Hammed ibn ’Isa from al-Husayn ibn al-Mukhtar from abu Basir who has said that he heard abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) say the following about this verse of the Holy Quran. “In fact, the Quran consists of illustrious verses that exist in the hearts of those who have knowledge. . .” [29:49] The Imams (a.s.) pointed to his own hear.”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ahmad ibn Mahran has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali from Hammed ibn ’Isa from al-Husayn ibn al-Mukhtar from abu Basir who has said that he heard abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) say the following about this verse of the Holy Quran. “In fact, the Quran consists of illustrious verses that exist in the hearts of those who have knowledge. . .” [29:49] The Imams (a.s.) pointed to his own hear.”

gradings.text: Shaykh Baqir al-Behbudi: ضعيف - Sahih al-Kafi

narratorChain.raw: أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مِهْرَانَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ الْمُخْتَارِ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ قَدْ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ وَ أُثْبِتَ فِي صُدُورِهِمْ
titles.en: Chapter 23 – The Imamsasws have been Given the Knowledge and Affirmed into theirasws chests

segments: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بَلْ هُوَ آياتٌ بَيِّناتٌ فِي صُدُورِ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ قَالَ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام ) .
arabic.text: اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بَلْ هُوَ آياتٌ بَيِّناتٌ فِي صُدُورِ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ قَالَ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام ) .

segments: From him, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abdul Aziz Al Abidy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [29:49] But these are clear Verses in the chests of those who are granted Knowledge, heasws said: ‘Theyasws are the Imamsasws’.
en.hubeali.text: From him, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abdul Aziz Al Abidy, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [29:49] But these are clear Verses in the chests of those who are granted Knowledge, heasws said: ‘Theyasws are the Imamsasws’.

segments: 2. It is narrated from him from Muhammad ibn Ali from ibn Mahbub from ‘Abd al-‘Aziz al-‘Abdi from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following about the words of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High. “In fact, the Quran consists of illustrious verses that exist in the hearts of those who have knowledge. . .” [29:49] ‘They are the Imams (a.s.)’.
en.sarwar.text: 2. It is narrated from him from Muhammad ibn Ali from ibn Mahbub from ‘Abd al-‘Aziz al-‘Abdi from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following about the words of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High. “In fact, the Quran consists of illustrious verses that exist in the hearts of those who have knowledge. . .” [29:49] ‘They are the Imams (a.s.)’.

gradings.label: ضعيف

gradings.text: Shaykh Baqir al-Behbudi: ضعيف - Sahih al-Kafi

narratorChain.raw: عَنْهُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنِ ابْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَبْدِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ قَدْ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ وَ أُثْبِتَ فِي صُدُورِهِمْ
titles.en: Chapter 23 – The Imamsasws have been Given the Knowledge and Affirmed into theirasws chests

segments: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فِي هَذِهِ الْآيَةِ بَلْ هُوَ آياتٌ بَيِّناتٌ فِي صُدُورِ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَمَا وَ اللَّهِ يَا أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ مَا قَالَ بَيْنَ دَفَّتَيِ الْمُصْحَفِ قُلْتُ مَنْ هُمْ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ قَالَ مَنْ عَسَى أَنْ يَكُونُوا غَيْرَنَا .
arabic.text: قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فِي هَذِهِ الْآيَةِ بَلْ هُوَ آياتٌ بَيِّناتٌ فِي صُدُورِ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَمَا وَ اللَّهِ يَا أَبَا مُحَمَّدٍ مَا قَالَ بَيْنَ دَفَّتَيِ الْمُصْحَفِ قُلْتُ مَنْ هُمْ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ قَالَ مَنْ عَسَى أَنْ يَكُونُوا غَيْرَنَا .

segments: And from him, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at, from Abu baser who said,

‘Abu Ja’farasws said regarding this Verse [29:49] But these are clear Verses in the chests of those who are granted Knowledge: ‘But, by Allahazwj, O Abu Muhammad! Whatever is said to be between the two covers of the Parchment’. I said, ‘Who are they, may I be sacrificed for youasws?’ Heasws said: ‘Who can they happen to be apart from usasws?’.
en.hubeali.text: And from him, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at, from Abu baser who said, ‘Abu Ja’farasws said regarding this Verse [29:49] But these are clear Verses in the chests of those who are granted Knowledge: ‘But, by Allahazwj, O Abu Muhammad! Whatever is said to be between the two covers of the Parchment’. I said, ‘Who are they, may I be sacrificed for youasws?’ Heasws said: ‘Who can they happen to be apart from usasws?’.

segments: 3. It is narrated from him from Muhammad ibn Ali from ’Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sama‘a from abu Basir from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following about this verse of the Holy Quran. “In fact, the Quran consists of illustrious verses that exist in the hearts of those who have knowledge. . .” [29:49] The Imams (a.s.) then said, “O abu Muhammad, for the sake of Allah, be the judge and tell, of who it is spoken (so often) between the two covers of the Holy Quran?” I then asked, “Who are they, “May Allah take my soul in service for your cause. The Imams (a.s.) said, “Who else can they be other than ourselves?”
en.sarwar.text: 3. It is narrated from him from Muhammad ibn Ali from ’Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sama‘a from abu Basir from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following about this verse of the Holy Quran. “In fact, the Quran consists of illustrious verses that exist in the hearts of those who have knowledge. . .” [29:49] The Imams (a.s.) then said, “O abu Muhammad, for the sake of Allah, be the judge and tell, of who it is spoken (so often) between the two covers of the Holy Quran?” I then asked, “Who are they, “May Allah take my soul in service for your cause. The Imams (a.s.) said, “Who else can they be other than ourselves?”

narratorChain.raw: وَ عَنْهُ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ سَمَاعَةَ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ قَدْ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ وَ أُثْبِتَ فِي صُدُورِهِمْ
titles.en: Chapter 23 – The Imamsasws have been Given the Knowledge and Affirmed into theirasws chests

segments: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ بَلْ هُوَ آياتٌ بَيِّناتٌ فِي صُدُورِ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ قَالَ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام ) خَاصَّةً .
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ بَلْ هُوَ آياتٌ بَيِّناتٌ فِي صُدُورِ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ قَالَ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام ) خَاصَّةً .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Yazeed Shaghar, from Haroun Bin Hamza,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I heard himasws saying: ‘[29:49] But these are clear Verses in the chests of those who are granted Knowledge, theyasws are the Imamsasws in particular’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Yazeed Shaghar, from Haroun Bin Hamza, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I heard himasws saying: ‘[29:49] But these are clear Verses in the chests of those who are granted Knowledge, theyasws are the Imamsasws in particular’.

segments: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Yazid Sha‘ar from Harun ibn Hamza who has said that he hear abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) say who has said the following. “In fact, the Quran consists of illustrious verses that exist in the hearts of those who have knowledge. . .” [29:49] ‘They are the Imams (a.s.) exclusive of all others.’”
en.sarwar.text: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Yazid Sha‘ar from Harun ibn Hamza who has said that he hear abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) say who has said the following. “In fact, the Quran consists of illustrious verses that exist in the hearts of those who have knowledge. . .” [29:49] ‘They are the Imams (a.s.) exclusive of all others.’”

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ يَزِيدَ شَغَرٍ عَنْ هَارُونَ بْنِ حَمْزَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ قَدْ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ وَ أُثْبِتَ فِي صُدُورِهِمْ
titles.en: Chapter 23 – The Imamsasws have been Given the Knowledge and Affirmed into theirasws chests

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بَلْ هُوَ آياتٌ بَيِّناتٌ فِي صُدُورِ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ قَالَ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام ) خَاصَّةً .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ بَلْ هُوَ آياتٌ بَيِّناتٌ فِي صُدُورِ الَّذِينَ أُوتُوا الْعِلْمَ قَالَ هُمُ الْأَئِمَّةُ ( عليهم السلام ) خَاصَّةً .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl who said,

‘I asked himasws about the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [29:49] But these are clear Verses in the chests of those who are granted Knowledge, Heasws said: ‘Theyasws are the Imamsasws in particular’.
en.hubeali.text: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl who said, ‘I asked himasws about the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [29:49] But these are clear Verses in the chests of those who are granted Knowledge, Heasws said: ‘Theyasws are the Imamsasws in particular’.

segments: 5. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘d from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl who has said that he asked abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) about the meaning of the following verse of the Holy Quran. “In fact, the Quran consists of illustrious verses that exist in the hearts of those who have knowledge. . .” [29:49] The Imams (a.s.) said, “They are the Imams (a.s.) exclusive of all others.”
en.sarwar.text: 5. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Husayn ibn Sa‘d from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl who has said that he asked abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) about the meaning of the following verse of the Holy Quran. “In fact, the Quran consists of illustrious verses that exist in the hearts of those who have knowledge. . .” [29:49] The Imams (a.s.) said, “They are the Imams (a.s.) exclusive of all others.”

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ قَالَ
